overall_comment: All required artifacts present and publication-ready; figures clearly show MSE=2.78e-04 beating target=0.01 with baseline and Bayes floor annotated; only cosmetic minors remain.

issues.issue: Suptitle vertical spacing is tight against the (a)/(b) panel titles in the top row.
issues.fix: Pass y=1.02 to fig.suptitle(...) or increase top padding.

issues.issue: Panel (b) bar-height annotation '1.46163' for the constant baseline sits close to the top edge.
issues.fix: Expand y-axis upper limit or place the numeric label just below the bar top with va='top'.

issues.issue: Legend has 4 entries inside the plot area (style guide prefers <=3 inside, or outside).
issues.fix: Move legend outside with bbox_to_anchor=(1.02, 1), or drop the 'GP uncertainty (+-2 sigma)' entry and annotate the band directly.

issues.issue: Top-left multi-line annotation block (MSE / Target / Bayes floor / Fitted kernel) is dense.
Legend sits in lower-right inside the plot area with 4 entries; on some frames the true-signal curve passes under the legend.
issues.fix: Move legend outside the axes or up to 'upper center' above the plot.
